text.page_description: Submit questions the AI could not answer and review responses from the System Admin.
text.admin_description: Review Pending requests, provide one System Admin Response, and view Resolved request history.
text.waiting_description: Your request is pending. You can create another request after the System Admin responds.
text.no_history: You do not have any resolved AI Support Requests yet.
text.pending_cta_help: View your active request while waiting for the System Admin Response.
text.fallback_cta_help: Review the question and add context before submitting it as an AI Support Request.
text.create_help: Please add enough context so the System Admin can understand your issue.
text.response_final: Submitting this response will resolve the request.

empty.no_active_description: Create an AI Support Request when the AI cannot answer your question.

empty.no_pending_description: New Account Holder requests will appear here for review.
empty.no_resolved_title: No Resolved AI Support Requests yet
